title: Green Thumb Industries Inc (GTBIF) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Green Thumb Industries' Q3 2024 earnings call provided management insights into the company's third quarter performance and forward outlook. The company reported Q3 2024 revenue of $287 million, up 4% year-over-year, with adjusted EBITDA of $89 million representing 31% of revenue. Net income was $9 million or $0.04 per share. The company expanded its retail footprint to 98 locations after opening four new dispensaries in the quarter. Management acknowledged ongoing pricing pressures as a key challenge, with comparable store sales declining 2.7% year-over-year. However, the CPG segment demonstrated strength with revenue growth exceeding 15% compared to Q3 last year, driven by market share gains in Ohio, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and New York. The company secured a landmark $150 million syndicated bank loan, enabling the retirement of $225 million in senior debt maturing in April 2025. Capital expenditures totaled $18 million in Q3. Management expressed concern about a deteriorating pricing environment and cautioned that pricing pressures would likely continue.
